goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x0: Real) { closed_interval_set(lower, upper).contains(x0) implies -k0 <= x0 and x0 <= k0 } }
proof: function(x0: Real) { not (x0 > 0 and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ closed_interval_set(lower, upper) or (-x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) }) }(bound)

function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ closed_interval_set(lower, upper) or (-bound <= x0 and x0 <= bound) }(w0)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0 > 0 and forall(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ closed_interval_set(lower, upper) or (-w0 <= x0 and x0 <= w0) } }
function(x0: lib(set).Set[Real]) { exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ x0 or (-k0 <= x1 and x1 <= k0) } } = is_bounded_real_set(x0) }(closed_interval_set(lower, upper))
